summary: Full backend + frontend regression for QuickPOS. All 16 pytest backend tests pass (auth/login PIN 1234, categories CRUD with reference-guard, products CRUD, sales w/ stock decrement & ticket numbering, dashboard KPIs, daily/monthly reports, email 'skipped' flow, closure persistence, settings email_configured=false). Frontend e2e: login PIN pad -> redirect to POS, add products to cart, +/- qty, Encaisser modal with Espèces + montant -> Receipt modal + success toast, Products page create new product appears in table, Dashboard shows 4 Recharts surfaces + KPIs, Reports page shows RESEND_API_KEY alert and 'Clôturer & envoyer' produces warning toast 'Email simulé' and closure persisted.

issues: Cosmetic: pin-display dots reset to empty after submit, but PIN is sent correctly. Non-blocking.

critical_code_review_comments: HistoryPage.jsx: data-testid='history-table' is placed on <tbody> instead of <table>. Functionally fine, but slightly misleading for testing. Consider moving to <table> and adding data-testid='history-row' on <tr>.
server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'); FastAPI now recommends lifespan handlers. Non-blocking for MVP.
MONGO_URL / DB_NAME accessed via os.environ['KEY'] without fallback is good (fail-fast). RESEND_API_KEY correctly defaulted to '' to support skipped flow.
next_ticket_number() resets per UTC day which matches dashboard aggregation; OK.
Stock decrement uses max(0, ...): silent floor; no over-sell error returned. Acceptable for MVP but consider returning 400 when stock insufficient and track_stock=True.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (login, POS cart +/-, checkout cash, receipt, products create, dashboard, reports send-skipped)

seed_data_creation: None added. Backend tests use TEST_ prefix and clean up. Sales generated during testing remain (3 sales for today + 2 closures).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all 16 critical paths. Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v. The email 'skipped' path is verified end-to-end (closure persisted with email_status.status='skipped'). If RESEND_API_KEY is later configured, update TestEmail to also test 'sent' status. Frontend selector convention is kebab-case; receipt-close button exists, dashboard kpi-num-sales works, reports send-daily-btn/send-monthly-btn work.
